title: The Key to Loki’s Chains
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Luffy, Unknown person #4, Zoro, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.
scene: Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It suits you better than that helmet, don'tcha think?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Duh! It's my treasure!! I'm holding onto it for shanks!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Holding onto it? He didn't just give it to you? What a cheapskate.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And don't call him that! You don't know the first thing about him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You've got a mouth on you, brat.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah, this is that "white form" I heard about...

summary: This part advances the Scopper Gaban and Elbaf’s New Threat through 16 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
